title: Per-card VRAM mode on the Pod: --lowvram only for 24GB cards, --normalvram for 32GB+ (5090 did 4K WITHOUT lowvram on v0.7.0). Blanket lowvram may slow big cards.
description:
BATCHED under MPI-145 (v0.9.0 plan: .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-145/plan.md). Co-ships in one image rebuild; cannot be verified independently. FOLLOW-UP to MPI-144. v0.8.1 added `--lowvram` BLANKET to the Pod wrapper for ALL cards (matching local routes/comfy.js:283, which uses lowvram for every NVIDIA GPU). This FIXES the 24GB 4090 OOM. BUT: the 32GB 5090 ran LTX-2.3 — including a 4K i2v — on v0.7.0 with NO lowvram (default normalvram) and worked. --lowvram trades speed for fitting (constant VRAM<->RAM streaming), so forcing it on a 5090 that doesn't need it likely SLOWS that card unnecessarily.

PROPOSED: make the Pod VRAM mode CONDITIONAL on the card's VRAM (the wrapper knows the GPU / can query nvidia-smi at boot, or the app passes the card tier):
- <= 24GB VRAM (4090, A4000, etc.) -> --lowvram (needs it, accept the tax)
- >= 32GB VRAM (5090, A100, H100, etc.) -> --normalvram (fits, faster)
The split point is the LTX working-set-in-VRAM threshold; tune from test data (24GB OOMs in normalvram; 32GB fits).

VERIFY: (a) 5090 in normalvram is FASTER than 5090 in lowvram (confirm the regression is real before optimizing). (b) 4090 still survives in lowvram. (c) the mode is selected correctly per card without a manual flag.

NOTE: also relevant to model load TIME — lowvram loads the full model to RAM first (slow on the Pod's network-SSD, ~slower than the user's local M.2). normalvram on a big card may load faster too. Model LOAD slowness is partly disk-bound (Pod SSD, no safe remote NVMe path) — separate, mostly-unfixable. Sampling speed is MPI-145 (sage).

CONTEXT: the non-linear resolution/duration -> gen-time behavior the user saw (3s=1:22, 5s=1:44, sometimes resolution barely changes timing) ALSO happens on the user's LOCAL system — so it is MODEL/two-stage-pipeline behavior (fixed stage-1+upscale+decode overhead dominates), NOT a Pod regression. Do not chase it as a remote bug.

NEEDS AN IMAGE REBUILD (batch v0.9.0). BRANCH: RunPod / mpi-ci only.
activeSessionTitle: Per-card VRAM mode in wrapper (co-ships sage v0.10.0 batch)
